    "HasA": [
      "それは木製パネルにテンペラと金箔を使用しています。",
      "それは4つの主要部分から成ります。",
      "それは中央にイエス、両脇にモーセとエリヤが描かれています。",
      "それはイエスとその追随者たちの場面を含んでいます。",

      "それは伝統的なビザンチン様式を持っています。",
      "それは2層の修道士の独房を含んでいます。",
      "それは上部部分に小さな教会建築を含んでいます。"

      "それはヴェネツィア絵画の影響を受けたクレタ風建築の複雑さを持つことが特徴です。",

      "それは幾何学的な形状を持つことが特徴です。",
      "それはセクション内の幾何学化が三次元空間を示唆していることが特徴です。",
      "それは修道士たちが17世紀初頭に着ていた印象的な衣装を持つことが特徴です。",

      "それは修道院共同体の日常生活のスナップショットを持つことが特徴です。"

      "それは繰り返し現れるモチーフである祈りの数珠を描くために使用されます。",
      "それは修道院共同体の日常生活のスナップショットを捉えるために使用されます。"

IsA: It is a multi-themed tempera painting.
It is a work of art.
HasA: It has tempera and gold leaf on a wood panel.
It has four main parts.
It has Jesus in the center, flanked by Moses and Elijah.
It has scenes with Jesus and his followers.
It has two figures lying on a unique diagonal plane.
It has monks in their daily lives.
It has Cretan architectural complexity influenced by Venetian painting.
It has a traditional Byzantine style.
It has two levels of monastic cells.
It has a small church building to the right on the top portion.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by tempera and gold leaf on a wood panel.
It is characterized by Cretan architectural complexity influenced by Venetian painting.
It is characterized by a traditional Byzantine style.
It is characterized by two levels of monastic cells.
It is characterized by Roman archways with red and green marble columns.
It is characterized by geometric shapes.
It is characterized by the geometrization within the section alluding to a three-dimensional space.
It is characterized by the impressive attire the monks wore in the early 17th century.
It is characterized by prayer beads as a recurring motif.
It is characterized by a snapshot of the daily life within a monastic community.
UsedFor: It is used for depicting the Transfiguration and monastic scenes.
It is used for showing monks in their daily lives.
It is used for illustrating Cretan architectural complexity.
It is used for demonstrating the traditional Byzantine style.
It is used for displaying two levels of monastic cells.
It is used for showing Roman archways with red and green marble columns.
It is used for alluding to a three-dimensional space.
It is used for showing the impressive attire the monks wore.
It is used for depicting prayer beads as a recurring motif.
It is used for capturing a snapshot of the daily life within a monastic community.
LocatedIn: It is located at the holy monastery.
It is located on the island of Crete.
It is located in the collection of Saint Catherine's Monastery in Mount Sinai, Egypt.
CreatedBy: It was created by Greek painter Georgios Klontzas.
CreatedIn: It was created on the island of Crete.
ConsistsOf: It consists of four main parts.
It consists of the transfiguration in the upper portion.
It consists of Jesus in the center, flanked by Moses and Elijah.
It consists of scenes with Jesus and his followers.
It consists of two figures lying on a unique diagonal plane.
It consists of monks in their daily lives in the middle portion.
It consists of monastic cells.
It consists of a small church building.
It consists of a small stairwell.
It consists of a fantastic garden.
PartOf: It is part of the collection of Saint Catherine's Monastery in Mount Sinai, Egypt.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mount Sinai.
It is associated with Saint Catherine of Alexandria.
It is associated with the sacred Egyptian martyr.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the early 17th century.
It occurred on the island of Crete.
About: It is about the Transfiguration.
It is about monastic scenes.
It is about the daily lives of monks.
It is about Cretan architectural complexity.
It is about the traditional Byzantine style.
It is about monastic cells.
It is about Roman archways.
It is about the attire of monks.
It is about prayer beads.
It is about a monastic community.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Venetian painting.
It was influenced by the traditional Byzantine style.
Influenced: It influenced the creation of Cretan prototypes.
